0.q: ∆AaHapX failed to produce siderophores on CAS medium and showed reduced AaNps6, AaSit1, and AaMirB expression, indicating AaHapX positively regulates siderophore biosynthesis.

1.q: ∆AaAtf1 produced fewer siderophores on CAS medium and showed reduced AaNps6 expression under iron-limited conditions.

2.q: ∆AaHapB failed to produce siderophores; complementation strains restored siderophore production, indicating AaHapB positively regulates siderophore biosynthesis.

3.q: ∆AaHapC failed to produce siderophores; complementation strains restored siderophore production.

4.q: ∆AaHapE failed to produce siderophores; complementation strains restored siderophore production.

5.q: The biosynthesis of siderophores is negatively regulated by AaSreA under iron-replete conditions; ∆AaSreA overproduced siderophores.

6.q: AaHapX was recruited to bind to the AaHapB/AaHapC/AaHapE complex, which in turn suppressed the expression of AaSreA.

7.q: Under iron-depleted conditions, HapX promotes siderophore production and iron acquisition by suppressing the expression of SreA; qRT-PCR showed AaSreA expression increased in ∆AaHapX.

8.q: Under high-iron conditions, the expression of AaSreA was upregulated, which in turn suppressed the expression of AaHapX, AaAtf1, and genes involved in siderophore biosynthesis.

9.q: Under high-iron conditions, the expression of AaSreA was upregulated, which in turn suppressed the expression of AaHapX, AaAtf1, and genes involved in siderophore biosynthesis.

10.q: Under iron-limited conditions, AaAtf1 enhanced the expression of AaNps6, thus playing a positive role in siderophore production.

11.q: AaSreA and AaHapX form a transcriptional feedback negative loop to regulate iron acquisition in response to the availability of environmental iron.

12.q: AaSreA and AaHapX form a transcriptional feedback negative loop to regulate iron acquisition in response to the availability of environmental iron.

13.q: Deleting an AaNps6 gene in the tangerine pathotype of A. alternata results in a mutant that fails to synthesize siderophores.
